# rust-terminal-clipboard0.4

Compatibility package for the published `terminal-clipboard 0.4.1` release
pinned by the `termimad 0.34.1` lockfile. The generated metadata patch removes
only Android, macOS, and Windows dependencies. The published crate declares MIT
but omits the license file, so the package restores the standard MIT text with
the upstream author attribution. Clean Fedora 43 and Fedora 44 x86_64 mock
builds passed, and the package is enabled.
